grammar.title: 📘 SAY HELLO · saludar y presentarte
grammar.intro: En esta primera lección aprendes a saludar, presentarte y preguntar el nombre. Repasa y luego escucha a la gente conocerse.

cells.body:
I'm Ana. = My name is Ana.
Nice to meet you.
This is my friend, Tom.

What's your name?
Where are you from?
How are you? — I'm fine, thanks.

I'm = I am
Nice to meet you (la primera vez)
Nombres y I siempre con mayúscula

grammar.ladderLabel: Saludos por el día — según la hora:
grammar.note: Cómo funciona: escucha cada audio 2 veces 🎧, responde el multiple choice, y contesta la pregunta de speaking en voz alta. ¡Sin traductor! Fíjate en los saludos y en cómo dicen su nombre.

story.title: ★ MEETING NEW PEOPLE
story.intro: Hoy varias personas se conocen por primera vez: en la calle, en una escuela y entre amigos. Escucharás 4 audios cortos y claros:

audios.title: 🎧 AUDIO 1 · MEETING SOMEONE NEW
audios.desc: Ana y Tom se conocen por primera vez. Fíjate en los nombres y de dónde son.

speaking.prompt: Introduce yourself: say your name, where you're from, and how you are.
speaking.starter: Hello, I'm… I'm from… and I'm fine, thank you.

transcript.html: Hello! I'm Ana. What's your name?
Hi Ana. My name is Tom. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too. Where are you from, Tom?
I'm from Canada. And you?
I'm from Mexico.
Cool! How are you today?
I'm fine, thank you. And you?
I'm great, thanks!

audios.title: 🎧 AUDIO 2 · GOOD MORNING!
audios.desc: Leo llega a una escuela de inglés. Fíjate en el saludo y dónde está su clase.

questions.q: What time of day is it?

speaking.prompt: Greet someone for the morning and say who you are.
speaking.starter: Good morning! I'm… I'm a new student.

transcript.html: Good morning! Welcome to Star English School.
Good morning. I'm Leo. I'm a new student.
Nice to meet you, Leo. I'm Emma.
Nice to meet you, Emma.
How are you?
I'm a little nervous, but I'm okay!
Don't worry. Your class is on the second floor. Have a nice day!
Thank you. Goodbye!

audios.title: 🎧 AUDIO 3 · THIS IS MY FRIEND
audios.desc: Ana presenta a dos amigos. Fíjate en "This is…" y en los trabajos.

speaking.prompt: Introduce a friend to someone. Use This is…
speaking.starter: This is my friend… She is from… and she is a…

transcript.html: Tom, this is my friend Maria. Maria, this is Tom.
Hi Maria, nice to meet you.
Hi Tom, nice to meet you too. Where are you from?
I'm from Canada. And you?
I'm from Spain. I'm a teacher.
Oh, nice! I'm a student.
Welcome! See you soon.
Bye, see you!

audios.title: 🎧 AUDIO 4 · GOODBYE FOR NOW
audios.desc: Ana le deja un mensaje corto a Tom. Fíjate en la despedida.

questions.q: What does Ana say at the end?

speaking.prompt: Leave a short goodbye message for a new friend.
speaking.starter: Hi, it's… It was nice to meet you. See you soon. Goodbye!

transcript.html: Hi Tom, it's Ana. It was very nice to meet you today! This is my phone number — send me a message. My friend Maria is from Spain, and she's a teacher. She's very nice. Let's meet again soon. Have a good evening. Goodbye, Tom! See you!

writing.title: ✍️ INTRODUCE YOURSELF
checklist: Di tu nombre: My name is… / I'm…
Di tu trabajo o que eres estudiante: I'm a student / a teacher.
writing.example: Hello! My name is Sofia. I'm from Argentina. I'm a student and I work in a café. I'm twenty years old. Nice to meet you!
writing.hw: Escribe tu presentación y graba un audio diciéndola en voz alta. Envíame ambos por WhatsApp y lo corregimos. ¡Cualquier duda la vemos en clase!

lines: Hello! I'm Ana. What's your name?
Hi Ana. My name is Tom. Nice to meet you.
Nice to meet you too. Where are you from, Tom?
I'm fine, thank you. And you?
Good morning! Welcome to Star English School.
Good morning. I'm Leo. I'm a new student.
Nice to meet you, Leo. I'm Emma.
I'm a little nervous, but I'm okay!
Don't worry. Your class is on the second floor. Have a nice day!
Tom, this is my friend Maria. Maria, this is Tom.
Hi Maria, nice to meet you.
Hi Tom, nice to meet you too. Where are you from?
I'm from Spain. I'm a teacher.

Hi Tom, it's Ana. It was very nice to meet you today! This is my phone number, send me a message. My friend Maria is from Spain, and she's a teacher. She's very nice. Let's meet again soon. Have a good evening. Goodbye, Tom! See you!
